response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, particularly with cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and performance optimization. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile applications and embedded systems rather than AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or hardware-software co-design. His lack of direct experience with deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, and hardware optimization for AI accelerators significantly impacts his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong expertise in cloud infrastructure and distributed systems (e.g., Stripe, Shopify, Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to optimize performance in high-scale environments (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling)
Extensive experience with software-hardware integration (e.g., robotic arms, embedded systems)
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Limited background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Lacks advanced hardware-software co-design experience typical of AI accelerator roles
